name: Haut à Courroies leather handbag
description:
Hermès Haut à Courroies 32 – Courchevel Leather – Natural – Gold Hardware – 1993

Elegant and highly collectible, this authentic Hermès Haut à Courroies (HAC) 32 is crafted from classic Courchevel leather in the coveted Natural color, complemented by gold-plated hardware. The HAC is the original inspiration behind the Birkin, known for its structured silhouette and refined equestrian heritage.

This vintage 1993 piece showcases Courchevel leather’s signature cross-hatch texture, offering excellent durability while maintaining a sophisticated, structured shape. The warm Natural tone pairs beautifully with the gold hardware, creating a timeless and versatile luxury statement. Accessories include dustbag, clochette, padlock and key.

Details:

Brand: Hermès

Model: Haut à Courroies (HAC) 32

Year: 1993

Leather: Courchevel

Color: Natural
